title: Docusign app integration Error

posts.author: Khanh82 (Khanh Nguyen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I signed up for Docusign Business Pro plan so I can integrate with Monday. I downloaded the Docusign app and during the integration, I got this error {“error”: “Session Not Identified”}

What I tried so far to fix this:
1- clear cache
2- Safari private browser
3- chrome regular and incognito mode
4- restarted computer

Nothing works. I have the correct Business Pro plan as needed per Docusign. Anyone found a fix for this? I saw back in 2022, some people had the same issues and it wasn’t marked as resolved. There were no solutions.

Screenshot 2023-10-25 at 2.56.00 PM826×310 11 KB

posts.author: mmcarteeri (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey, i can relate, really
tech glitches can be so frustrating, from what you’ve tried, it sounds like u’ve covered some of the basics. clearing cache, trying different browsers, and even restarting ur pc are good trobleshooting steps. but it’s a bit strange that the issue persists. since u’ve already checked your docusign plan, that’s a good start. but it might still be worth to check if everything’s set up correctly on the docusign side

posts.author: Khanh82 (Khanh Nguyen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2023-10-26 at 1.26.32 PM1336×1932 396 KB

I received a reply from Docusign…basically they’re saying they did not do that app on Monday.com and I should reach out to Monday.com instead. Monday is bouncing me to Docusign, Docusign bouncing me back to Monday.

What do I do now?

In the marketplace:

@Matias.Monday just pinging you here in case you might be able to help sort out who is responsible for supporting this app. I assume its docusign as its not a first party integration.

posts.author: jbradford (Jody)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m struggling with this App too…it would be such a time saver if I could get it to work. One thing I did find out is that you do have to be an administrator on your DocuSign account in order to integrate it. I don’t have that level of permissions on our DocuSign account, so I was wondering if that was why I was getting the session error (I’m getting the same one you are). I was going to have our Admin try to do the install, but I’ve ran into some hurdles where our security team is requiring more documentation on the integration before we can move forward. I’m trying to get that now from the developer. If I’m able to move forward and have any luck I’ll let you know!

posts.author: igaranin (Igor Garanim)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re also encountering the same issue. Have anyone found any solutions? Thanks

posts.cookedHtml: Hey, has an issue with the integration and docusign say that monday asked them to create an app so they basically just paid someone to do it for them. no one will support it. it’s frustrating.

posts.author: EQR (EQR)
posts.cookedHtml:
I set up a meeting with Moveoboost (the developer).

Here is the solution they provided which worked and enable the status labels to be updated (upon signing completion), with completed files also uploaded to the files board.

  1. Go to Automate and DELETE the docusign automation recipe.
  2. Check Docusign ‘Connect’ and check if the configuration is removed.
  3. Go to ‘item view - docusign’ and re-sign back into docusign
  4. Go to automations and set up the docusign automation template
  5. Check Docusign 'Connect’and check if configuration is added.
  6. The configuration should be named mondayConnect_(Board name), if it says undefined you may need to contact moveoboost to clear your webhook settings.

Hope this helps.
